comment
Implementation runtime fetched from RSK testnet via eth_getCode at
address 0x0b75fc65eda9ded22f774f3c7045b52024959eb3. The runtime is
wrapped in a minimal init code that just CODECOPY+RETURNs the runtime,
since OpenZeppelin upgradeable implementations don't rely on their own
constructor running (storage lives on the proxy).

This fixture pairs with the second @Test in EthModuleGasEstimationDSLTest:
testEstimateGas_proxyConstructorDelegatecallToInitializer_onchainBytecode,
which uses Jeremy's exact proxy creation calldata (tx
0xddb735039288b9b8e08c9929e26577866e9a0f38edf8c61f01da69e827face96)
and patches the impl address to point at the contract deployed below.
end

account_new acc1 100000000

# Deploy a copy of the on-chain implementation runtime via fake init code.
# Cost ~ intrinsic + per-byte init + CODE_DEPOSIT (200 * 19687 ~= 3.94M).
transaction_build tx01
    sender acc1
    nonce 0
    receiverAddress 00
    value 0
    data 
    gas 6000000
    build

block_build b01
    parent g00
    gasLimit 7500000
    transactions tx01
    build

block_connect b01
assert_best b01
